questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует 'after' для будущего действия?

choices.text: After the class will end, we'll go home.
After the class ends, we'll go home.
After the class ended, we'll go home.
After the class is ending, we'll go home.

questions.explanation: В придаточном после 'after' используется Present Simple, а не Future.

choices.text: After she will arrive, we'll have dinner.
After she arrives, we'll have dinner.
After she arrived, we'll have dinner.
After she is arriving, we'll have dinner.

questions.explanation: После 'after' всегда используется Present Simple, даже если действие еще не произошло.

choices.text: After he will finish homework, he'll play.
After he finishes homework, he'll play.
After he finished homework, he'll play.
After he is finishing homework, he'll play.

questions.explanation: В придаточном после 'after' используется Present Simple, поэтому 'finishes' правильный вариант.

choices.text: After they will arrive, we'll meet.
After they arrive, we'll meet.
After they arrived, we'll meet.
After they are arriving, we'll meet.

questions.explanation: После 'after' используется Present Simple, поэтому 'arrive' — правильный выбор.

choices.text: After I will check the email, I'll reply.
After I check the email, I'll reply.
After I checked the email, I'll reply.
After I am checking the email, I'll reply.

questions.explanation: После 'after' должно быть Present Simple, поэтому 'check' правильный вариант.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно описывает будущее событие?

choices.text: After you will wake up, we'll have breakfast.
After you wake up, we'll have breakfast.
After you woke up, we'll have breakfast.
After you are waking up, we'll have breakfast.

questions.explanation: В придаточном после 'after' используется Present Simple, поэтому 'wake up' верно.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует 'after' для будущих действий?

choices.text: After the movie will start, we'll sit down.
After the movie starts, we'll sit down.
After the movie started, we'll sit down.
After the movie is starting, we'll sit down.

questions.explanation: После 'after' используется Present Simple, поэтому 'starts' правильный ответ.

choices.text: After the meeting will finish, we'll discuss.
After the meeting finishes, we'll discuss.
After the meeting finished, we'll discuss.
After the meeting is finishing, we'll discuss.

questions.explanation: В придаточном после 'after' всегда Present Simple, поэтому 'finishes' верно.

choices.text: After the train will arrive, we'll board.
After the train arrives, we'll board.
After the train arrived, we'll board.
After the train is arriving, we'll board.

questions.explanation: После 'after' используется Present Simple, поэтому 'arrives' правильный вариант.

choices.text: After I will finish the project, I'll rest.
After I finish the project, I'll rest.
After I finished the project, I'll rest.
After I am finishing the project, I'll rest.

questions.explanation: В придаточном после 'after' используется Present Simple, поэтому 'finish' правильный выбор.
